items.title: Hollander POTD Armen Gilliam. Star UNLV PF drafted 2nd by PHO in 87. Underwhelmed in PHO but developed into a good low post scorer. Contrary to bio was not timid but wasn't a good passer. Peaked at 18 ppg 9 rpg for NJ in 95-96. Retired in 2000 at age 35. Sadly died young. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst

items.title: Becky Hammon: "I'm f---ing tired of that bulls--t. ... when Awak Kuier shoots more free throws than A'ja Wilson and Jackie Young and Chennedy Carter all combined, that's a problem.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Becky Hammon: "I'm f---ing tired of that bulls--t. ... when Awak Kuier shoots more free throws than A'ja Wilson and Jackie Young and Chennedy Carter all combined, that's a problem.

"We're not getting the same whistle. Give me my fine."

www.espn.com/wnba/story/_...

media.title: Hammon calls out refs, 'tired' of Aces' free throw disparity
media.description: Aces coach Becky Hammon blasted the officiating in Thursday's 95-87 loss to the Wings, saying that A'ja Wilson, Chennedy Carter and Jackie Young combining for one free throw attempt was a result of "not getting the same whistle."

items.title: On vacation but quick takeaways from the Mosley presser.
items.author: Shamit Dua
items.body_excerpt:
On vacation but quick takeaways from the Mosley presser.

1) make no mistake Jordan Dumars is an influential inner circle voice in the Pelicans. Pelicans still have not formally hired him. 

2) messaging on defense was loud and clear, which is good for a young team.

Cont.

items.title: Hollander POTD Roger Brown. NYC star got blacklisted for bogus gambling scandal. Played in minors til ABA then starred for IND from 1967-1974. 4x all-star peaked at 23 ppg. Dominated 70 Finals. Per bio "he shouldn't even bother to show up before the playoffs." Died too young RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Roger Brown. NYC star got blacklisted for bogus gambling scandal. Played in minors til ABA then starred for IND from 1967-1974. 4x all-star peaked at 23 ppg. Dominated 70 Finals. Per bio "he shouldn't even bother to show up before the playoffs." Died too young RIP.
